parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { template_key: $json.template_key, template_version: $json.template_version, field_values: $json.field_values, approval: $json.approval ?? { mode: 'none' }, output_format: $json.output_format, event_id: $json.event_id } }}

parameters.jsCode: const provider=$json; const input=$('Validate and map fields').first().json; const reference=provider.output_reference??provider.id??null; if(!reference) throw new Error('Document adapter did not return an output reference'); return [{json:{event_id:input.event_id,client_id:input.client_id,workflow_name:input.workflow_name,feature_type:input.feature_type,status:'success',records_processed:1,records_failed:0,workflow_steps:[...input.workflow_steps,{step_key:'generate_document',step_name:'Generate document',status:'success'},{step_key:'approval',step_name:'Apply approval route',status:input.approval?.mode==='none'?'skipped':'pending'}],entity_refs:input.entity_refs??[],metadata:{template_key:input.template_key,template_version:input.template_version,output_reference:reference,output_format:input.output_format}}}];
